findings.summary: llmx -o + shell & background produces 0-byte files — must use Bash run_in_background without &
findings.evidence: 4+ brainstorm reruns needed, GPT and Gemini both affected
findings.proposed_fix: rule: never combine llmx -o with shell & — use Bash tool run_in_background:true

findings.summary: Gemini model name gemini-3.1-pro → 404, should be gemini-3.1-pro-preview
findings.evidence: First brainstorm batch all failed for Gemini
findings.proposed_fix: already in memory — load llmx-guide BEFORE dispatching

findings.summary: GPT-5.4 exhausted 16K max_tokens on reasoning, produced 0 output
Subagent gate blocked all 6 initial agent dispatches — synthesis budget instruction missing
findings.proposed_fix: efficiency: include synthesis budget instruction in every research-type dispatch

findings.summary: Purpose not articulated until mid-session — 17 artifacts built for wrong goal before user clarified recursive self-improvement
findings.evidence: First 4 brainstorms optimized for architectural elegance, not operator tax
findings.proposed_fix: process: elicit purpose BEFORE building context — ask what are you trying to achieve first
